title: 🧹 THE GREAT UI CONDENSATION & GALAXY HOME SCREEN
items: Simplified Particle Options: Stripped the particle settings down to just Type, Count, and Size Scale — removed emitters, rotation, gravity vortex, flicker, subtle mode, and touch sparkles for a clean, focused experience.

Swipe-to-Select Pickers: Replaced all dropdowns for Wallpaper Mode, Still/Animated Wallpaper selection, and Font Family with beautiful horizontal swipe pickers featuring live previews and animated scaling.
Wallpaper Section Moved Up: Relocated the Wallpaper & Parallax Engine Lab higher in the Settings menu, above particles and typography, for faster access.
Galaxy Always on Home: The swirling Galaxy animated background now always plays on the Home/Inventory screen with zero particles — other screens respect user settings normally.
Enhanced Readability Scrim: Added a stronger gradient darkening overlay when any wallpaper or the Galaxy background is active, keeping all foreground panels, cards, and text crisp and readable.
Swipe-Only Theme Picker: Removed all option rows and tuning panels from the Theme Picker screen — it is now a pure swipe-to-preview palette selector.

title: 🖼️ THE WALLPAPER & GYROSCOPIC PARALLAX ENGINE LAB
items: Exclusive Still Wallpapers: Bundled 19 gorgeous high-fidelity pixel-art scenes covering Gungeon chambers, weapons, and characters in assets/images/wallpapers/still/.
Gyroscopic Parallax Motion: Created a hardware-accelerated parallax engine that dynamically sways and offsets the background image based on the physical phone tilt accelerometer readings.
Animated Live Loops: Integrated a high-performance video player engine to play seamless 8-second looping MP4 backgrounds (vortex galaxy, weapons racks, sewer gelatin) with elegant fallback support.
Unified Settings Lab: Designed a dedicated 'Wallpaper & Parallax Engine Lab' section inside both Settings and the Premium Theme Picker to manage selections and toggles in perfect unison.

title: 🎨 THE INVENTORY DENSITY & LEGIBILITY CONTROL LAB
items: Flexible Inventory Grid Density: Added a customizable periodic grid column count setting in Style Lab and Settings, allowing users on standard/compact phones to seamlessly scale the inventory layout between 2 (compact), 3 (medium), or 4 (dense) columns.

Premium Subtle Particle Mode: Introduced an advanced legibility toggle that halves background particle counts across all custom presets and theme-specific backdrops, maximizing text readability in low-light environments without sacrificing the beautiful floating ambiance.
Integrated Style Lab Options: Consolidated all grid layout, periodic columns, and inventory text scaling options under a unified, beautiful 'Inventory Grid & Display Tuning' section.
Unified Customization Panels: Reorganized the full Vibe & Customization Tuning panels inside the Premium Theme Picker to stay perfectly in sync with the primary settings screens.

title: ⚙️ THE PREMIUM PARTICLE REDESIGN & GLOBAL GOOP CONVERSION
items: Categorized Particle Themes: Critically redesigned all background custom particles and grouped them into Elements (Ember, Frost, Toxic, Lightning, Rainbow), Metal (Golden Shells, Brass Casings, Steel Sparks), and Bone (Necrotic Skull, Skeletal Ashes, Tombstone Dust).
Dynamic Wind and 3D Z-Depth: Added flowing colored background wind paths and physical diagonal vector winds to all premium custom particles, and added Z-depth parallax scale factors.
Global GoopText Integration: Wrapped all Database Search row results, Item/Gun Detail titles, and Shrine Picker modal attributes in GoopText, so they convert dynamically to Goopian in perfect unison.
Consolidated Procedural Backgrounds: Removed raw static GIF options to exclusively use our ultra-clean, high-performance, GPU-accelerated animated procedural backdrops.

title: 📺 THE PROCEDURAL BACKGROUNDS & SPECIAL HUD REFACTOR UPDATE
items: Special Inventory HUDs: Gunderfury, Triple Gun, and Evolver are now fully rendered as separate, detailed dashboard panels right after the main player character DASH, just like Ser Junkan!
Procedural Animated Backgrounds: Introduced high-performance, real-time CRT Analog Static and Cyber Glitch Screen backdrops, painted entirely procedurally via hardware-accelerated canvas commands.
Central Dimming Readability Mask: Applied a deep radial gradient vignette over the center and corners of all animated backgrounds, ensuring that card text, labels, and icons remain 100% readable.
Settings Tooltip showDuration: Calibrated info-tooltip popups under the Style Lab Settings screen to stay visible for 5 full seconds instead of vanishing too quickly.

Dynamic Particle Gyro sways: Hooked up real-time accelerometer tilt forces to all default and custom particle systems, allowing floating stars, cat paws, and gunfairies to sway organically as you tilt your phone.

title: 🏹 THE PRE-RELEASE GENERAL UX & SYSTEM POLISH UPDATE
items: Polymorphic Theme Refactor: Moved all theme flair definitions directly into enum templates, removing thousands of lines of scattered switch-case blocks.

Redesigned Tactical Stats: Created wide double-column inventory cards showing a full 6-parameter stats spreadsheet on top of a giant blurred background gun/item icon, complete with active fire-mode/type tags.

Shrine Picker Upgrades: Cleanse shrine is now sorted to the absolute top of the list, activation sheet graphics are enlarged to a giant 120x120 size, and explicit 'Heart Container -1' penalty badges are displayed for Angel and Blood shrines.
App Appearance Compaction: Consolidated all font-tuning dropdowns and sliders into a single unified card in Settings with ultra-compact 32px slider track profiles.

Huntress HUD Slider: Implemented an information-dense sliding tab dashboard showing Junior II dog item drop weights (doubling to 10% if Baby Good Mimic is held), Crossbow HP breakpoints, and Oubliette/Abbey key economies.
Main Menu Aesthetics: Enlarged GungeonMate title outlines and ribbons on the main menu, and expanded our central Tailor mascot with 16 new highly detailed Gungeon-lore quotes.
Tactile ScaleButton Integration: Wrapped all primary main menu categories, the Tailor mascot, and Gunfortuna dice triggers in physical bouncy button scaling and automatic haptics.
Optimized Display Options: Permanently deleted wonky, unpolished views ('RPG Bag rows' and 'Gallery Display') and redundant tips menus to keep the app lean, fast, and optimized.

Goopian Language Mode: Added an immersive Goopian translation engine option in Settings. Activating it converts mascot dialogues and gun/item titles into Professor Goopton's unreadable cipher symbols.

The Sponge 🧽 Mode Toggle: Implemented a prominent, glowing interactive Sponge button in the Active Run app bar when Goopian is active. Tapping it magically runs a matrix-deciphering translation stream to reveal readable English text.

title: 🎯 THE ROAD TO 1.0: PRE-RELEASE CONSOLIDATION
items: Version Scheme Revamp: Reset and consolidated app versioning, laying the stable foundation for our official Play Store launch in July!
Premium Companion Features: Clean and highly optimized run tracking, synergies reference, dual-telemetry tactical stat grid layouts, and active co-op syncing.
Completely Free: GungeonMate is 100% free and open-source for all Enter the Gungeon fans to use, track, and master their runs.
Dynamic Stylization: Real-time theme picker previews, particle customizers, and physical hardware gyroscope sways are fully calibrated for maximum smoothness.
Optimized APK Build: Compiled a highly streamlined, high-performance production-ready release APK available for direct sideloading.
